summary: Replaced stale FGame GUI event API calls in FMainFrame with model-safe API usage.
Updated onLeftDClick() to convert screen pixel coordinates to logical map coordinates via WXMapDisplay::getScale(wxDC&) and call FGame::handleMapClick(mapX, mapY).
Updated onLeftUp() to perform GUI-side end-turn button hit testing using the same strategic turn-counter geometry and call FGame::processEndTurn().
Preserved existing menu state transitions and refresh behavior for both turn transitions.
Replaced removed m_game->draw() invocations with Refresh() so repaint remains panel-driven through WXGameDisplay.

tests.note: Failures are outside this subtask's allowed files and align with pre-existing cross-subtask test expectations.
